function.name: _execute_informat_script
function.description:
Execute the specified method of the Informat script file in the [published application runtime environment]. Used to simulate or trigger script logic during the official application runtime.

Execution instructions:
- The executed script must have been published with the application and exist in the [published application]
- Only the script content in the published version can be executed, it will not read or affect unpublished scripts in the designer
- If scriptId is not specified, the script to be executed can be inferred based on the context
- If functionName is not specified, the method to be called can be inferred based on user intent
- Only real functions exported through export in the script can be called, calling non-existent methods is prohibited
- The execution process will not modify the script content, nor will it create test or temporary script files

Applicable scenarios:
- Verify the actual execution effect of the script after publication
- Simulate real business calls
- Troubleshoot script issues in the runtime environment.

functionName.description: Function name, needs to be an exported method

functionParams.description: Input parameters required to execute the target function, passed in order; if the function requires no parameters, an empty array [] can be passed
